notes.hr: Filipinski rum s otoka Negros. Neovisna mjerenja: ~29 g/L dodanog šećera, glicerol i vanilin — izražena vanilija i suho voće, desertni profil. U EU iznad 20 g/L nosi oznaku 'spirit drink'. Popularan kod publike; kritika ga smatra slatkim — ovdje samo deklariramo činjenice.
notes.en: Filipino rum from Negros island. Independent measurements: ~29 g/L added sugar plus glycerol and vanillin — pronounced vanilla and dried fruit, dessert profile. Above 20 g/L it is labelled 'spirit drink' in the EU. Popular with the public; critics find it sweet — we simply declare the facts.

cigarHint.hr: Lagana, Connecticut ili lagani Habano — NE puna cigara
cigarHint.en: Mild, Connecticut or mild Habano — NOT a full cigar

notes.hr: Barbadoška baza (West Indies Rum Distillery, 1893.) s dodanim šećerom (~40–51 g/L po neovisnim mjerenjima) i aromama — vanilija, karamela, banana. U SAD-u se puni na 35% ('rum specialty'), u EU na 40% uz oznaku 'spirit drink'. Isti brend, druga zemlja od XO izdanja: Original je s Barbadosa, XO iz Paname.
notes.en: A Barbados base (West Indies Rum Distillery, 1893) with added sugar (~40–51 g/L per independent measurements) and flavourings — vanilla, caramel, banana. Bottled at 35% in the US ('rum specialty') and 40% in the EU as a 'spirit drink'. Same brand, different country from the XO: the Original is from Barbados, the XO from Panama.

additiveDetail.hr: Hidrometrija: ~19 g/L dodataka (znatno manje od Originala)
additiveDetail.en: Hydrometer: ~19 g/L additives (far less than the Original)

cigarHint.hr: Srednja-jaka, maduro ili Broadleaf — espresso i tamna čokolada
cigarHint.en: Medium-strong, Maduro or Broadleaf — espresso and dark chocolate

notes.hr: Panamski rum (destilerija Las Cabras) dozrijevan u ex-bourbon bačvama i dovršen u andaluzijskim sherry bačvama. Mjerenja pokazuju ~11–19 g/L dodataka — unutar EU granice za rum. Isti brend, druga zemlja od Originala: XO se peče i dozrijeva u Panami, Original na Barbadosu.
notes.en: A Panamanian rum (Las Cabras distillery) aged in ex-bourbon casks and finished in Andalusian sherry casks. Measurements show ~11–19 g/L additives — within the EU limit for rum. Same brand, different country from the Original: the XO is distilled and aged in Panama, the Original in Barbados.
